name: power-cat-skills
description: Power Platform development extensions curated by Microsoft Power CAT (Customer Advisory Team)

plugins.name: powercat-adoption
plugins.description: Skills for Power Platform adoption storytelling — turn customer stories into polished, brand-matched HTML presentation decks.

plugins.name: powercat-canvas-apps
plugins.description: Skills to analyze Canvas App performance and guide migrations from InfoPath and SharePoint to modern Power Platform.

plugins.name: powercat-code-apps
plugins.description: Skills to generate brand-aligned design guides for code apps built on the Power Platform.

plugins.name: powercat-dataverse
plugins.description: Skills for authoring and troubleshooting Microsoft Dataverse Web API queries — natural language to OData, FetchXML conversion, multi-surface targeting, and error diagnosis.

plugins.name: powercat-governance
plugins.description: Skills for Power Platform governance and administration — provision developer environments with standard governance defaults and automate admin center workflows.

plugins.name: powercat-procode-eval
plugins.description: Automated eval generation for Power Apps Code Apps and Generative Pages — feature presence checks, unit tests, static security analysis, and an HTML dashboard.

plugins.name: powercat-mcp-proxy
plugins.description: MCP reverse-proxy manager — add, remove, and sign-in to MCP servers that require OAuth bearer tokens via a local FastAPI proxy.

plugins.name: powercat-sales-insights-mcp
plugins.description: Standalone local FastMCP server for Sales Insights — exposes successhub_query, open_pipeline, and cohort tools backed by Dataverse OData.

plugins.name: powercat-paranoid-curious-portfolio-pulse
plugins.description: Portfolio Pulse dashboard — aggregates Power BI and Sales Insights MCP data into an executive-ready portfolio health view.
